name: Postman
description: Monitor Postman workspaces and team API collections for development compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Postman
2. Click Settings (gear icon) > Account Settings
3. Go to API Keys
4. Click Generate API Key
5. Give it a name and copy the key
6. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Postman API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Postman Settings > Account Settings > API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Postman workspace members and API access

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Postman workspaces are organized for environment separation
